prompt: Keep the draft inside Enron, loop in Gerald Nemec for legal review, and hold the outside send until the clean version is approved.
summary: Rather than sending the draft Master Firm Purchase/Sale Agreement outside to Cargill, Debra retains the draft inside Enron, loops in Enron legal (Gerald Nemec) and credit/legal support (Sara Shackleton) for review, and explicitly instructs the team to hold any external transmission until a clean, legally approved version is circulated. Gerald acknowledges, flags specific legal points, and commits to legal sign-off; Debra issues an internal status update confirming the hold.

messages.subject: Master Agreement (Internal draft — DO NOT SEND)
messages.body_text: Attached is the draft Master Firm Purchase/Sale Agreement prepared for Cargill. Please review internally. Gerald, please lead the legal review; Sara, please review credit provisions. Do NOT send this outside Enron (to Cargill or any third party) until we have a clean, approved version. Please return comments by end of next week so I can circulate a redline.
messages.rationale: Keeps the draft inside Enron and formally loops in legal and credit reviewers while explicitly instructing to hold external transmission.

messages.subject: Re: Master Agreement (Internal draft — DO NOT SEND)
messages.body_text: Thanks, Debra. I'll review for legal issues and return marked-up comments by Thursday. Initial flags: tighten indemnity/limitation language, clarify force majeure and termination triggers, and confirm any credit carve-outs with Sara. I will not clear any external sending until I sign off on the final clean copy.
messages.rationale: Legal acknowledges review, identifies key clauses to address, and reiterates the hold on external distribution pending legal sign-off.

messages.subject: Re: Master Agreement — internal status
messages.body_text: Quick update: Holding the draft internally pending Gerald's legal review and Sara's credit input. I will circulate a clean, approved version for final sign-off before any outreach to Cargill.
messages.rationale: Notifies internal stakeholders that external send is on hold and outlines next steps for internal approval.

top_subjects: Re: Master Agreement (Internal draft — DO NOT SEND)
Master Agreement (Internal draft — DO NOT SEND)
notes: Recipient scope was clamped to internal Enron participants.
Message 1 used a non-thread recipient; it was clamped to gerald.nemec@enron.com.
Message 2 used a non-thread recipient; it was clamped to debra.perlingiere@enron.com.
